commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh There is none holy as the LORD: for there is none beside you: neither is there any rock like our God. This is frequently a title of God, the holy one of Israel, Isaias i. He is essentially holy. Hebrew, "no rock like "The rocks of Palestine were the common fortresses of the nation, having caverns to which the people fled for refuge. Hence God is often called a rock, (Calmet) as none can afford such protection. (Haydock) (Psalm xvii. , and Deuteronomy xxxii.
